history.content:
<thought>
I am at 02B, facing right (>). The cell ahead (02C) is floor (.), so I can move forward safely. I plan to go to 02D, then turn down to reach the goal at 04D while avoiding lava at 03C and 04C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I have moved forward to 02C, still facing right. The cell ahead (02D) is floor (.), safe. I will continue moving forward to get closer to the column of the goal before turning down.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at 02D facing right. The goal is at 04D, directly below me. To go down, I need to turn right (clockwise) from right to face down. The cells below (03D and 04D) are safe: 03D is floor and 04D is goal. I will turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at 02D facing down, and the goal is at 04D. The cell directly ahead (03D) is safe floor, and then 04D is the goal. I can move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at 03D facing down, and the goal is directly ahead at 04D. The cell is safe (G). I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
